confirmatory_analysis.name: Regime-stratified robustness check
confirmatory_analysis.finding: No <=1e-3 feasible points were found in optimistic, nominal, or conservative priors; stability claim is not supported in this run.

panels.A: Median epsilon_tot versus detuning with 90% CI bands across pulse families.
panels.B: Surrogate R2 diagnostics across pulse family and prior scale.

paper/figures/h1_detuning_landscape_resi.variables: Detuning in Hz, total infidelity (unitless), surrogate fit R2 (unitless).
paper/figures/h1_detuning_landscape_resi.takeaway: Interior detuning regions dominate feasible fast points when surrogate assumptions hold.
paper/figures/h1_detuning_landscape_resi.uncertainty: 90% confidence intervals from bootstrap over seed/prior realizations.

panels.A: Unimodality pass-rate heatmap by prior scale and pulse family.
panels.B: Baseline median gate-time trajectories across tau targets.

paper/figures/h1_unimodality_and_baselin.variables: Pass rate (0-1), tau target (unitless), gate time in microseconds.
paper/figures/h1_unimodality_and_baselin.takeaway: Convex-surrogate assumptions pass robustly across regimes; baseline trajectories are shown where feasible.
paper/figures/h1_unimodality_and_baselin.uncertainty: Median lines summarize seed variability; table provides complementary feasible-count statistics.

panels.A: Feasibility rates over tau and bound modes.
panels.B: Required improvement factor to recover feasibility when floor exceeds tau.

paper/figures/h3_feasibility_region_and_.variables: Tau target, feasibility rate (0-1), required factor (log scale).
paper/figures/h3_feasibility_region_and_.takeaway: Strict tau regimes transition to infeasible under conservative/stress bounds, quantifying FC2 boundaries.
paper/figures/h3_feasibility_region_and_.uncertainty: Monte Carlo variability from seeded uncertainty draws.

panels.A: Bound validity and monotone-feasibility pass rates by bound mode.

paper/figures/h3_assumption_audit.pdf.takeaway: Assumption validity remains above 95%, satisfying stress-test acceptance thresholds.
paper/figures/h3_assumption_audit.pdf.uncertainty: Rates aggregated over seeds and uncertainty percentiles.

panels.A: Posterior predictive empirical coverage versus sample count and method.
panels.B: Out-of-sample violation rates across tau targets.

paper/figures/h4_posterior_checks_and_vi.takeaway: Chance-constrained selection maintains violation rates below alpha across methods at relaxed-to-moderate tau.
paper/figures/h4_posterior_checks_and_vi.uncertainty: Empirical coverage scatter across seeds; violation curves summarize posterior sample variability.

panels.A: Bayesian median T_tau with approximate 90% interval ribbon.

paper/figures/h4_tradeoff_with_ci.pdf.variables: Tau target, gate time in microseconds.
paper/figures/h4_tradeoff_with_ci.pdf.takeaway: Posterior-calibrated times provide uncertainty-aware fastest-point recommendations for H4.
paper/figures/h4_tradeoff_with_ci.pdf.uncertainty: 90% interval estimated from posterior predictive quantiles.

panels.A: H1 deterministic and H4 Bayesian speed evidence across targets.
panels.B: H3 feasibility support rates for each target.

paper/figures/integrated_evidence_flow.p.variables: Gate time in microseconds, feasibility rate (0-1), tau target.
paper/figures/integrated_evidence_flow.p.takeaway: Integrated consensus is strong where feasibility support exceeds 0.5; stricter targets become provisional.
paper/figures/integrated_evidence_flow.p.uncertainty: Cross-experiment consistency score summarizes disagreement magnitude between H1 and H4 estimates.
